title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Metro Shoes Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Metro Shoes Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Metro Shoes Advisory Limited:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited!
